rationale: Gov't Code §1431.017 governs AG review of anticipation notes and obligations; it is unrelated to the homestead exemption amount in Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: Following authorization of an anticipation note or other obligation under Section 1431.015, the issuer shall submit to the attorney general a transcript of proceedings related to issuance of the anticipation note or other obligation
_note: Rule text concerns municipal anticipation note review; no nexus to homestead exemption levels.
